markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on GTM strategy, community launch, and member acquisition goals.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The community launch is tomorrow; Will will create a FOMO-inducing highlight reel to reinforce the 14% visitor-to-pay conversion rate.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [A new member acquisition strategy will prioritize channel exploration over immediate ROI, with a $300–$500 acceptable CPA to drive volume.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [Will and Jesus will conduct 10 member interviews (5 each) to guide future content development, focusing on member needs.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [Kyle's immediate priorities are setting up EventHapply and its Zoom integration to enable automated post-event sequences.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)

## Topics

### Community Launch & Member Acquisition

  - [**Launch Plan:** The community launch is tomorrow. The team will amplify Marcel's central LinkedIn post.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [**Launch Asset:** Will will create a highlight reel video by tomorrow to reinforce the 14% visitor-to-pay conversion rate.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The video is for the community feed, not the social post, to reinforce the value proposition for new visitors.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [**Acquisition Strategy:** The new strategy prioritizes channel exploration over immediate ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
      - [**Acceptable CPA:** $300–$500 per paid member is acceptable for the first 6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To drive volume and discover effective channels.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [**Content Funnel:** All content (YouTube, workshops) will be structured to drive traffic to the community.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [**YouTube:** Continue posting clips (e.g., first 15 mins of workshops) to act as a top-of-funnel driver.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [**Member Interviews:** Will and Jesus will conduct 10 interviews (5 each) to guide future content development.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To ensure new resources are intentionally designed to meet member needs.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
      - [**Process:** Create a shared Ocean doc for questions; use Jason's Circle account for DMs.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)
  - [**Referral Opportunity:** Jason will explore a partnership with "Lovable" to leverage their large mailing lists for a promotional push.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)

### Platform & Tooling

  - [**Course Feedback:** Marissa suggested adding a "how to get the most out of this course" blurb at the beginning to front-load information and improve retention.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [**Community Structure:** The community's discussion channels will be simplified to one or zero.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To prevent a "dead" feeling and focus member activity.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [**Traffic Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)
      - [**`ailygrowth.com`:** The long-term organic content machine.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
      - [**Direct Circle Links:** For warm conversations, as they convert better by offering immediate, valuable content.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
      - [**Future State:** Edin is exploring using the Circle API to pull dynamic, gated content onto `ailygrowth.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [**EventHapply Setup:** Kyle's top priorities are setting up EventHapply and its Zoom integration.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To enable automated post-event sequences defined in Gloria's FigJam.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
  - [**Enrichment:** Always-on enrichment will be deprioritized for now.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The immediate need is for mass outbound campaigns, not inbound lead scoring.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)

      - [Schedule 5 member interviews.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)
  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)

      - [Request Zoom webinar account access for testing.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
      - [Explore a promotional partnership with "Lovable."](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
  - [**Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [Amplify Marcel's LinkedIn post tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [Create a shared Ocean doc for member interview questions.](https://fathom.video/share/Cp6rDaHj3jVsdbszAybvetbnffT5A5F5?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)
